title: Fixing Edge Case in Insertion Order for TRIE

statement.markdown: Implement a function to insert strings into a trie and return the root of the updated trie. The function should return the root of the trie after successful insertion. The inserted strings are space-separated and are input from the standard input.
statement.inputFormat: A string of space-separated strings to be inserted into the trie.
statement.outputFormat: The root of the updated trie.
statement.notes: The input strings are assumed to be unique and do not contain any spaces other than the ones separating the strings.

examples.output: The root of the updated trie.
examples.explanation: Insert the strings 'apple', 'cat', and 'dog' into the trie and return the root of the updated trie.

functionSignature.python: def insert(self, root, word: str) -> TrieNode:

testCases.output: The root of the updated trie should contain all inserted strings.
The root of the updated trie should contain all inserted strings including duplicates.
